Emily Johnson
Dallas, TX

Summary:
Dedicated and efficient Warehouse Associate with over 3 years of experience in fast-paced warehouse environments. Proven ability to lift and carry heavy loads, operate RF scanners, and utilize basic computer skills effectively. Committed to maintaining a safe and organized workspace while meeting production goals.

Experience:

Warehouse Associate  
ABC Logistics, Dallas, TX  
March 2021 - Present  
- Operate RF scanners to track inventory and manage shipments, ensuring accuracy and efficiency in stock handling.  
- Consistently lift and move items weighing up to 50 lbs, contributing to timely order fulfillment.  
- Collaborate with team members to maintain a clean and organized warehouse environment, adhering to safety protocols.  
- Assist in training new hires on warehouse procedures and equipment operation.

Warehouse Worker  
XYZ Distribution Center, Dallas, TX  
January 2020 - February 2021  
- Supported daily shipping and receiving operations, utilizing RF scanners for inventory management.  
- Engaged in manual lifting and transporting of goods, regularly handling loads exceeding 50 lbs.  
- Conducted routine inspections of equipment and materials to ensure compliance with safety standards.
